series_metadata.series_description: Official statement of Attorney General's views on a legal question prepared by Assistant Attorney General of the Opinions Section. (Therefore, an informal letter may not be described as an official statement of the Attorney General's views on a question and should not be cited as an "Attorney General opinion".

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative or legal value, then destroy. ; Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative or legal value, then destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
